email.subject: {{name}} - {{status}}
email.bodyDocument:
Hello,

Please find the document attached.

Document: {{name}}

Best regards

Hello,

Please find the attached document.

Best regards,
EnviroMaster NVA Team

logs.title: Version Change Logs - {{title}}
logs.noLogsBody: No price override changes have been logged for this version yet.
logs.noIndividualChanges: No individual changes recorded for this version.

bulkModal.title: Upload {{count}} Files to Bigin
bulkModal.description: This will upload all selected files to Bigin. Each file will be processed individually.

deleteModal.subtitle: This action will move the item to trash
deleteModal.noteAgreement: This will move the entire agreement and all its files to trash.
deleteModal.noteFile: This will move only this file to trash.

uploadModal.chooseFiles: Choose PDF Files or Drag & Drop
uploadModal.hint: Select one or more PDF files to attach to this agreement
